name: Luke Hamel @ Hamel's AC & Heating
message: Luke, running Hamel's as owner means you're wearing every hat, and a cold-call load probably still lands on you. When you're ready to bring on a rep who can actually knock and close for an HVAC shop, SalesEdge places outside sales reps through specialist recruiters. Worth a chat?

name: Sammy Shelton @ Four Seasons AC Heating & Refrigeration
message: Sammy, running Four Seasons as president means any rep hiring friction lands on your desk. SalesEdge places outside sales reps for HVAC and trades through our specialist recruiter network. Faster than the usual agency route. Worth 15 min?

name: Robert Dykes @ Multi-Trade Home Services
message: Robert, running multi-trade home services in Houston means every rep has to carry weight across HVAC, plumbing, electrical. Reps who sell across trades without being generalists are rare. That's what SalesEdge recruits. Specialist-sourced, fast. Worth a chat?

name: Rachelle Payne @ American Plumbing Heating Cooling & Electrical
message: Rachelle, VP at a multi-trade shop means you're calling the rep-hiring shots. SalesEdge places outside sales reps for plumbing, HVAC, and electrical brands through recruiters built specifically for trades. Faster fit than generalists. Open to a chat?

name: Douglas Beasley @ Ace Home Services
message: Doug, +50% headcount growth at Ace is a real rocket. At that pace, every next sales hire matters hugely, and the wrong fit stalls the whole curve. SalesEdge places outside sales reps for trades through specialist recruiters, built for this exact moment. Worth a chat?

name: Tim Colgan @ MEP Partners
message: Tim, Director of BizDev at MEP Partners means three trades in one sales motion. Reps who can sell across all three without being generalists are rare. That's what SalesEdge recruits. Outside sales for multi-trade, specialist-sourced. Worth 15?

name: William Hansen @ Hansen Plumbing
message: William, VP Sales at a NYC metro plumbing company means you're recruiting in the most expensive talent market in the country. SalesEdge places outside sales reps for trades through specialist recruiters who actually know the vertical. Worth a chat?

name: Richard Moro @ All American HVAC
message: Richard, CEO of All American HVAC means every sales hire is a direct reflection of the business. When you're ready to expand the outside sales team, SalesEdge places reps for HVAC companies through specialist recruiters, not generalists. Worth a quick chat?

name: Scott McLeod @ Fields & Fowler HVAC/Plumbing/Electrical/Generators
message: Scott, Sales Director running HVAC, plumbing, electrical, AND generators is a lot of product lines for any one rep to master. SalesEdge places outside sales reps for trades through recruiters who specialize in your vertical, not generalists. Worth 15?

name: Todd Kiefer @ Tiger Plumbing/Heating/AC
message: Todd, Tiger at 34 people and $12M revenue is where sales-rep fit compounds across the team. SalesEdge places outside sales reps for plumbing and HVAC companies through specialist recruiters. Faster fit than the generalist route. Worth 15 min?

name: Tony Cavallo @ T.Webber Plumbing/Heating/Air/Electric
message: Tony, 46 people and $15.9M at T.Webber means sales-rep fit compounds across the team. Four trades in one company, and generalist recruiters miss the nuance. SalesEdge places outside sales reps for trades through vertical specialists. Worth 15?

name: George Wright @ 1st Choice Pest Control
message: George, running 1st Choice as owner means every hire is personal. When you're ready to bring on an outside sales rep who can actually knock doors and close, SalesEdge places pest-control sales specialists through vertical-focused recruiters. Worth a chat?
